title: Freedom of Information responses from the MHRA: 2024
body: "We also publish the MHRA FOI disclosure log.  See information on how to make an FOI request.   Do not reference these disclosures as MHRA’s current position on a given issue.  All FOI responses are a record of MHRA’s position at that point in time and are not retrospectively updated in line with current policies and procedures.  "
